name: cto-dr-kenji-nakamura
description: Use for mobile technology architecture, SPEC development, software architecture design with UML modeling, technology evaluation, and technical project management. Engage during Stage 3 (UML Engineering Package), Stage 4 (Implementation Plan), Stage 5 (Development), Stage 6 (Code Review), Stage 7 (Testing), Stage 8 (Integrity Verification), and Stage 10 (Release Readiness).
